top_fixes.title: Fix your page title to attract customers
top_fixes.description: Your page title currently says 'Divider Icon' which tells Google and customers nothing about your plumbing business. Change it to something like 'B3 Plumbing - Licensed Plumber in Belconnen, Canberra' to help you show up when people search for local plumbers.

top_fixes.title: Add your business details for Google searches
top_fixes.description: Google doesn't have key information about your business like your address, phone number, and opening hours in a format it can easily understand. Adding this structured data will help you appear in local search results and Google Maps when people search for plumbers near them.

top_fixes.title: Make your site load faster
top_fixes.description: Your website is quite heavy (275KB) and has lots of code files that slow it down. This means potential customers might leave before your site loads, especially on mobile. Optimizing images and cleaning up the code will make customers stay longer and Google rank you higher.

top_fixes.title: Add clearer contact buttons
top_fixes.description: Make it crystal clear how customers can book your services. Add prominent 'Call Now', 'Book Online' or 'Get Free Quote' buttons that stand out on every page. The easier you make it to contact you, the more jobs you'll get.

top_fixes.title: Add trust signals to win more customers
top_fixes.description: Show potential customers why they should choose you over competitors. Add details about your licenses, insurance, guarantees, and customer reviews. This builds trust and helps people feel confident choosing your services.

top_fixes.title: Expand your service descriptions
top_fixes.description: While you mention services like blocked drains and hot water systems, adding more detailed descriptions helps customers understand exactly what you offer and helps Google match your site to more specific searches.

top_fixes.title: Add keyboard navigation support
top_fixes.description: Some customers use keyboards instead of mice to navigate websites. Adding a 'skip to content' link makes your site easier to use for everyone and can improve your Google ranking.

top_fixes.title: Tell Google how to index your site
top_fixes.description: Add proper robots instructions so Google knows exactly how to crawl and index your website. This ensures all your important pages show up in search results.

result.email_draft:
G'day,

I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers.

The biggest issue I spotted is your page title currently shows as 'Divider Icon' instead of something like 'B3 Plumbing - Licensed Plumber Belconnen'. This means when people search for plumbers in your area, Google doesn't know what your business actually does.

I also noticed your site is missing some key business details that help you show up in local Google searches and Maps results - things like your structured business information.

The good news is these are relatively quick fixes that could make a real difference to how many people find and contact you online.

I'd be happy to jump on a free 15-minute chat to walk you through what I found and how to fix it - no obligation, just want to help a local business succeed.

Cheers,
Jarek Piotrowski
LayerOps
result.summary: Your B3 Plumbing website has a solid foundation with good mobile design and social sharing setup, but the biggest issue is your page title says 'Divider Icon' instead of describing your plumbing business - this is costing you customers who can't find you on Google. The site is also quite heavy which might make customers leave before it loads, and you're missing key business information that helps Google show you in local searches.

top_fixes.title: Speed up your website loading
top_fixes.description: Your site takes too long to load and customers will leave before seeing your services. The messy code and large images are slowing you down. This costs you customers who need urgent plumbing help. Need to optimise images and clean up the website code.

top_fixes.title: Fix social media sharing
top_fixes.description: When customers share your website on Facebook or LinkedIn, it looks unprofessional with no business photo or proper description. This makes you look less trustworthy and reduces word-of-mouth marketing. Need to add sharing preview settings.

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to all your photos
top_fixes.description: Google can't see your photos of plumbing work, which hurts your search ranking. When customers search for 'Canberra plumber' or 'hot water repairs', you're missing out. Add descriptions to all images showing your work and services.

top_fixes.title: Fix the duplicate main headlines
top_fixes.description: You have two main headlines on your homepage which confuses Google about what your page is about. This can hurt your search ranking when people look for plumbers in Canberra. Should have just one clear main headline.

top_fixes.title: Make your site easier for everyone to use
top_fixes.description: People with disabilities can't easily use your site, and this also affects your Google ranking. Screen reader users and keyboard users struggle to navigate. This cuts out potential customers and hurts your search visibility.

top_fixes.title: Add more local area information
top_fixes.description: Your content doesn't mention specific Canberra suburbs you serve. When people in Belconnen or Tuggeranong search for a local plumber, you're harder to find. Add content about the areas you cover.

top_fixes.title: Make emergency messaging more prominent
top_fixes.description: Plumbing emergencies happen at all hours but your site doesn't clearly highlight emergency services or same-day availability. Customers with burst pipes need to see this immediately. Make emergency contact details bigger and more obvious.

top_fixes.title: Create individual service pages
top_fixes.description: You list services but don't have dedicated pages for blocked drains, hot water repairs, gas fitting, etc. This makes it harder for people to find you when searching for specific problems. Each service should have its own page with detailed information.

result.email_draft: G'day! I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers. Your site has great contact details and looks professional, but it's loading quite slowly which means potential customers might leave before seeing your services - especially important for emergency plumbing calls. Also, when people share your site on Facebook it doesn't show properly, which hurts your word-of-mouth marketing. These are pretty common issues that are straightforward to fix. Happy to chat about how to get more Canberra customers finding you online - would a free 15-minute call work for you this week? Cheers, Jarek Piotrowski, LayerOps
result.summary: Your plumbing website has good basics like clear contact details and professional content, but it's losing customers due to slow loading speeds and poor social media sharing. The site works but needs technical improvements to compete better in local searches and convert more visitors into customers.

top_fixes.title: Add labels to all your contact forms
top_fixes.description: Your contact forms don't tell visitors what information to enter in each field. This confuses customers and means people with disabilities can't use your forms at all. Add clear labels like 'Your Name', 'Phone Number', 'Message' to each field. This will help more people contact you for jobs.

top_fixes.title: Fix the messy HTML code in your Google listing
top_fixes.description: When your business appears in Google search results, it shows '&' instead of '&' which looks unprofessional. This happens in your business name and description. Clean up this code so you look professional in search results and get more clicks.

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to all your images
top_fixes.description: Your site has 18 images with no descriptions. Google can't tell what these images show, which hurts your search ranking. More importantly, potential customers using screen readers can't tell if an image shows your work, your team, or your services. Add descriptions to help Google and customers understand your business better.

top_fixes.title: Set up proper social media sharing
top_fixes.description: When someone shares your website on Facebook, LinkedIn or Twitter, it doesn't show your business name, description, or a professional image. This makes you look unprofessional and means fewer people will click through to your site. Set up proper sharing previews to get more referrals.

top_fixes.title: Clean up your website's code to make it faster
top_fixes.description: Your site is loading 48 different scripts and has messy code scattered throughout. This makes your site slower to load, which frustrates customers and hurts your Google ranking. Clean up the code to make your site faster and more reliable.

top_fixes.title: Tell Google exactly what your business does
top_fixes.description: Google doesn't have clear structured information about JML Plumbing's services, location, and contact details. Adding this business information helps you show up when people search for 'plumber near me' in Canberra. This is crucial for getting local customers.

top_fixes.title: Add a keyboard navigation shortcut
top_fixes.description: People who can't use a mouse have to tab through your entire navigation menu to reach your main content. Adding a 'skip to content' link helps these users and also improves your Google ranking for accessibility.

top_fixes.title: Fix headings that just say numbers
top_fixes.description: Some of your page sections have headings that just say '0' or numbers. Google can't understand what these sections are about, which hurts your search ranking. Replace these with descriptive headings like 'Emergency Plumbing Available 24/7' or 'Years of Experience'.

result.email_draft:
G'day!

I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers.

Your JML Plumbing site is doing well for Canberra searches, but there are two issues costing you jobs: your contact forms don't have proper labels (customers can't tell what info to enter), and when people share your site on Facebook it looks unprofessional with no business preview.

The good news? These are easy fixes that could bring in more calls within weeks.

I've put together a detailed report showing exactly what's affecting your Google ranking and customer conversions. Would you be up for a free 15-minute chat this week to walk through the key fixes?

Cheers,
Jarek Piotrowski
LayerOps
result.summary: Your JML Plumbing website has good basic SEO and shows up well for Canberra plumbing searches. However, you're losing potential customers because your contact forms are confusing and your site doesn't share properly on social media. The biggest issue is that people with disabilities can't use your forms at all, which also hurts your Google ranking.

A developer needs to clean up the code and optimize the scripts.

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to your photos so Google understands them better
top_fixes.description: 7 out of 8 images on your site don't have descriptions. This means Google can't properly understand what your photos show, and people using screen readers can't tell what's in the images. top_fixes.title: Fix social media sharing so your business looks professional

top_fixes.title: Improve your page description to attract more customers
top_fixes.description: Your current page description is generic and doesn't explain what makes your electrical services special. When people see your site in Google search results, they need a compelling reason to click. A better description mentioning your local area, emergency services, or specialties would get more clicks.

top_fixes.title: Add more detailed service information
top_fixes.description: Your service descriptions are very brief. Potential customers want to know exactly what you do, your experience, and why they should choose you. More detailed content about each service would help both customers and Google understand your expertise better.

top_fixes.title: Remove or clarify the 'temporary leave' notice
top_fixes.description: You have a 'temporary leave' notice on your homepage which might confuse visitors about whether you're currently available for work. If you're working, remove it. If not, make it clearer when you'll be back. Confused visitors won't call.

top_fixes.title: Help Google understand your local business better
top_fixes.description: Your site is missing structured data that tells Google exactly what type of business you are, your service areas, and contact details. Adding this information helps you show up better when people search for 'electrician in Canberra' or 'emergency electrician near me'.

top_fixes.title: Add customer reviews or testimonials
top_fixes.description: While you mention customer testimonials, having visible reviews on your homepage builds trust with new visitors. People want to see that others have had good experiences before they call. Consider adding a few customer reviews or testimonials prominently on your main page.

result.email_draft:
Hi there,

I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers.

The biggest issue is that your site is loading quite slowly due to messy code - potential customers often click away if a site takes too long to load, which could be costing you jobs. Also, most of your photos don't have descriptions, which hurts your Google ranking since search engines can't understand what the images show.

I also noticed that when people share your website on Facebook or LinkedIn, it doesn't show a proper preview with your business info - this means you're missing out on word-of-mouth marketing opportunities.

These are all fixable issues that could make a real difference to your online presence and help more Canberra locals find your electrical services.

Would you like a free 15-minute chat to discuss how these improvements could help your business?

Cheers,
Jarek Piotrowski  
LayerOps
result.summary: Your electrical business website has good bones with clear contact information and professional branding, but it's being held back by slow loading times and missing technical details that help Google understand your business. The biggest issues are messy code making the site slow, missing photo descriptions hurting your search ranking, and poor social media sharing setup that makes your business look unprofessional when shared online.

result.email_draft:
G'day! I'm Jarek from LayerOps, and I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers.

Your site looks really professional - clearly a lot of work has gone into the design. But I noticed your homepage title just says 'Home' instead of mentioning you're CBR Electrical Contractors in Canberra. This is hurting your Google ranking when people search for electricians locally.

I also spotted that many of your images are missing descriptions, which affects both your search ranking and accessibility for customers with disabilities. Plus, your homepage could use clearer 'Get Quote' buttons to help visitors know how to contact you for work.

These are all pretty straightforward fixes that could make a real difference to your lead generation. Happy to jump on a free 15-minute chat to walk through the specifics if you're interested.

Cheers,
Jarek Piotrowski

issues: Google can't tell if this is your preferred web address - you need to tell it which version of your page to show in search results

top_fixes.title: Remove placeholder text and fix your main headings
top_fixes.description: Right now you have dummy 'lorem ipsum' text in your headings and two main headings competing for attention. Google gets confused about what your page is actually about, which hurts your search ranking. Replace the placeholder text with real content about your electrical services and keep just one main heading per page.

top_fixes.title: Add preview images for social media sharing
top_fixes.description: When someone shares your website on Facebook, LinkedIn or Twitter, no image appears - just a blank preview. This makes your business look unprofessional and gets fewer clicks. Add a professional image (like your logo or a photo of your team) that appears when people share your site.

top_fixes.title: Fix your contact form so everyone can use it
top_fixes.description: Your contact form is missing labels for each field. People using screen readers (vision-impaired customers) can't tell which box is for their name, phone number, or message. This excludes potential customers and also hurts your Google ranking since accessibility affects SEO.

top_fixes.title: Make your site load faster
top_fixes.description: Your website takes over a second to load, but customers expect sites to load almost instantly. Slow sites lose customers before they even see your services. You need to reduce the number of code files loading and optimize your site's performance to keep potential customers from leaving.

top_fixes.title: Tell Google which version of your page to show
top_fixes.description: Google might be seeing multiple versions of your pages and doesn't know which one to show in search results. This can split your search ranking power and confuse customers. You need to add a canonical tag to tell Google which version is the 'official' one.

top_fixes.title: Add your email address to the page
top_fixes.description: Your phone number is easy to find, but your email address isn't displayed anywhere. Some customers prefer to email first, especially for quotes or detailed questions. Missing email contact options means you could be losing potential customers who don't like to call.

top_fixes.title: Set up proper instructions for Google's search robots
top_fixes.description: Your site isn't telling Google's crawling robots what they should and shouldn't index. While this isn't immediately breaking anything, it means you're not in full control of how your site appears in search results. Adding proper robot instructions helps Google understand your site better.

top_fixes.title: Add a skip link for keyboard users
top_fixes.description: People who can't use a mouse (including some disabled customers) have to tab through your entire navigation menu to reach your main content. Adding a 'skip to main content' link makes your site more accessible and shows you care about all customers.

result.email_draft:
Hi there,

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to all your images

top_fixes.title: Make your website accessible to everyone

top_fixes.title: Clean up your website's code to make it faster
top_fixes.description: Your site is loading 29 scripts and 11 stylesheets — that's like having 40 people trying to talk at once. This slows down your site, especially on phones. Faster sites rank better in Google and keep more patients from leaving before booking an appointment.

top_fixes.title: Fix your heading structure
top_fixes.description: Your page jumps straight to H2 headings without an H1, like starting a book at Chapter 2. This confuses Google about your content hierarchy. Organize your headings properly: H1 for your main title, then H2s for major sections like 'Our Services' and 'About Dr. Sri'.

top_fixes.title: Add an email contact option
top_fixes.description: You have a prominent phone number (great!), but some patients prefer to email first before calling. Adding an email address or contact form gives people more ways to reach you, potentially increasing bookings from people who don't like making phone calls.

top_fixes.title: Reduce inline styling for better maintenance
top_fixes.description: Your site has 21 instances of inline CSS styling mixed into your content. This makes your site harder to update consistently and can cause display issues. Moving these styles to your main stylesheet will make your site more professional and easier to maintain.

top_fixes.title: Make your page title more clickable

top_fixes.title: Speed up your website by cleaning up the code

top_fixes.title: Fix your contact form so everyone can use it
top_fixes.description: Your contact form is missing proper labels, making it hard for people with disabilities to use. This also hurts your Google ranking since Google cares about accessibility. Adding proper labels is a quick fix that helps you serve all customers.

top_fixes.title: Tell Google exactly what type of business you are

top_fixes.title: Make your phone number consistent everywhere
top_fixes.description: Your phone number appears in different formats across the site. This confuses customers and makes it harder for them to call you. Pick one format and use it everywhere for a more professional look.

top_fixes.title: Make your page title and heading match better

top_fixes.title: Add more specific call-to-action buttons

top_fixes.title: Make your content easier to scan

top_fixes.title: Organize your navigation menu better

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to your images

top_fixes.title: Set up social media sharing properly

top_fixes.title: Clean up your website's code

top_fixes.title: Reduce the number of fonts
top_fixes.description: Your site loads 9 different font styles — this is like having 9 different typewriters working at once. Each font slows down your site. Pick 2-3 main fonts and stick with them for a faster, more consistent look.

top_fixes.title: Make your awards and certifications more prominent

top_fixes.title: Add a skip navigation link

top_fixes.title: Modernise your design elements
top_fixes.description: Your site looks professional but some design elements could be more modern. Consider updating button styles, spacing, and layout to match current dental website trends. This helps visitors see you as a forward-thinking practice that keeps up with the latest developments.

issues: Your site has a good foundation but Google doesn't know what type of business you are - adding specific landscaping business information will help you show up in local searches
Your page description has a typo ('landscaing' instead of 'landscaping') which might confuse potential customers
Your page title and headings are well-structured for Google search
Some HTML text is showing encoded characters (& instead of &) which looks unprofessional in search results
Your site has good content structure with clear headings and sections
Could benefit from more detailed service descriptions to help customers understand exactly what you offer
Your site is set up to work on mobile phones
Mobile experience appears well-configured
When people share your site on Facebook or LinkedIn, it shows a proper preview with your business name and description
People using screen readers or keyboard navigation will struggle to use your site effectively
Your contact form isn't properly set up for people with disabilities
Missing navigation aids that help people with disabilities find their way around your site
Your main menu and site structure are clear and logical
Good internal linking between pages helps visitors and Google understand your services
You have clear call-to-action buttons like 'Book a consultation'
Phone number is visible but email address isn't easy to find for customers who prefer email contact
Your site is quite heavy to load - this means potential customers might get impatient and leave before seeing your services
Too many scripts and stylesheets are slowing down your site - this hurts your Google ranking and user experience
Most of your images (23 out of 32) don't have descriptions - this hurts both your Google ranking and accessibility
Your site has inconsistent styling with too much inline code, which can cause display issues

top_fixes.title: Speed up your website loading time
top_fixes.description: Your site is quite slow to load at 171KB, which means potential customers might leave before seeing your beautiful garden work. Google also ranks faster sites higher in search results. You need to optimize images and remove unnecessary code that's bloating your site.

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to your images
top_fixes.description: 23 of your 32 images are missing descriptions. This means Google can't understand what's in your photos (like 'before and after garden transformation') and people with vision impairments can't tell what they show. Adding descriptions helps both your search ranking and makes your site accessible to everyone.

top_fixes.title: Tell Google you're a landscaping business
top_fixes.description: Your site doesn't clearly tell Google that you're a professional landscaping service in Canberra. Adding proper business information helps you show up when people search for 'landscaper near me' or 'garden design Canberra'.

top_fixes.title: Make your site easier for people with disabilities to use
top_fixes.description: Your contact form and navigation aren't set up properly for people using screen readers or keyboard navigation. This excludes potential customers and also affects your Google ranking, as Google considers accessibility when ranking sites.

top_fixes.title: Fix the typo in your page description
top_fixes.description: Your page description has 'landscaing' instead of 'landscaping' - this looks unprofessional in Google search results and might make potential customers think you're not detail-oriented about your work.

top_fixes.title: Make your email address easier to find
top_fixes.description: Customers can see your phone number but your email address isn't prominently displayed. Some people prefer to email rather than call, so you might be missing out on inquiries from these potential customers.

top_fixes.title: Clean up the messy code behind your site
top_fixes.description: Your site has inconsistent styling and too much inline code scattered throughout. This makes your site harder to maintain and can cause display issues across different devices and browsers.

top_fixes.title: Fix encoded characters in your content
top_fixes.description: Some of your text shows & instead of & which looks unprofessional. This appears in your page title and descriptions that show up in Google search results.

result.email_draft:
Hi there,

I hope you're well! I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers.

Your site looks great, but it's quite slow to load (which means potential customers might leave before seeing your stunning garden transformations) and most of your photos are missing descriptions that help Google understand what amazing work you do.

The good news is these are straightforward fixes that could really boost your visibility when people search for landscaping services in Canberra.

Would you be interested in a free 15-minute chat about how to get your website working harder for your business? I'd be happy to walk you through the specific changes that would make the biggest difference.

Cheers,
Jarek Piotrowski
LayerOps
result.summary: Your landscaping website has a solid foundation with good mobile setup and social sharing, but it's being held back by slow loading times and missing image descriptions. These technical issues are likely costing you customers who leave before your beautiful garden photos load, and hurting your Google rankings.

raw_data.title: Gardengigs | Custom Garden Design & Landscaping Canberra
raw_data.meta_description: Gardengigs are your one stop shop to seeing your outside area transformed into a space you'll love to spend your time in. For landscaing canberra services, contact us today!
